news.summary: Through the use of blockchain analytics, the FBI has successfully traced a portion of the stolen cryptocurrency and managed to recover more than $40,000 with the assistance of Tether.

news.summary: On July 2nd, 2025, the Financial Supervisory Authority of Norway authorized the prospectus created by SalMar ASA for the listing on the Oslo Stock Exchange of the company's two bond issues.
news.headline: SalMar ASA's prospectus for listing two green bond issues approved by the Financial Supervisory Authority of Norway on 2 July 2025. Listed on Oslo Stock Exchange.

news.summary: Novotech has gained acclaim for its emphasis on biotechnology, pioneering approach to clinical trial execution, and top-tier customer service, establishing itself as a leader in contract research for biotechnology firms and small to medium-sized pharmaceutical companies. The company's global standing was highlighted in a press release issued on July 3, 2025, in San Antonio. Frost & Sullivan, a prominent research and consulting firm, was involved in the recognition of Novotech for its achievements in these areas.
news.headline: Novotech named 2025 Global Company of the Year by Frost & Sullivan for excellence in biotech clinical research services.

news.summary: In Singapore on July 3, 2025, Azentio Software, a prominent technology facilitator in the banking, financial services, insurance (BFSI), and enterprise resource planning (ERP) industries, revealed the designation of Harikrishnan Venkataramanan as President of ERP. This strategic move highlights Azentio's focus on the ERP sector.
news.headline: Azentio Software appoints Harikrishnan Venkataramanan as President-ERP to drive innovation and growth in BFSI and ERP sectors.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, EQT AB announced that their Half-year Report 2025 is scheduled for release on Thursday, July 17, 2025, at around 07:00 CEST. A conference call will be conducted by EQT at 08:30 CEST on the same day to discuss the report and hold a Q&A session. The presentation will be accompanied by a video link for the webcast, offering stakeholders an opportunity to engage with the company's performance.
news.headline: EQT AB's Half-year Report 2025 will be released on July 17, 2025, at 07:00 CEST, followed by a conference call at 08:30.

news.summary: In Basel on July 3, 2025, Novartis revealed the initial findings from the Phase III GCAptAIN research investigating the efficacy of Cosentyx® (secukinumab) in individuals experiencing new-onset or recurring giant cell arteritis (GCA).
news.headline: Novartis updates on Phase III GCAptAIN study of Cosentyx® in giant cell arteritis, with top-line results announced.

news.summary: In Bangalore, India, Assetze has recently introduced the 'Employer of IT' (EOI) model, which offers global companies a solution for overseeing IT operations during their expansion into India. This unique model has been officially launched to aid businesses in managing their IT needs efficiently.
news.headline: Assetze introduces Employer of IT (EOI) model for global companies entering India, aiding in IT management during expansion.

news.summary: The Global Finance & Technology Network (GFTN) has appointed Her Majesty Queen Máxima of the Netherlands, UN Secretary-General’s Special Advocate for Financial Health, as the Chair of the International Advisory Board (IAB). Joining her on the IAB as new members effective July 1, 2025, are Mr. Agustín Carstens and Mr. Sanjiv Bajaj. This move signifies a significant milestone for GFTN, highlighting the inclusion of globally renowned leaders in guiding its initiatives.
news.headline: Queen Máxima of the Netherlands appointed Chair of GFTN's International Advisory Board along with new board members, effective 1 July, 2025.

news.summary: In Stockholm, Sweden, on July 3, 2025, Karolinska Development AB (listed on Nasdaq Stockholm as KDEV) shared an update from Organon regarding the progress of the drug candidate OG-6219. Organon obtained OG-6219 through the acquisition of Forendo Pharma in 2021. Post the results of a Phase 2 clinical trial with OG-6219, Organon has decided to halt further clinical development of the drug candidate.
news.headline: Karolinska Development informed by Organon that OG-6219 drug development discontinued after Phase 2 study. KDEV stock update.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on July 3, 2025, Christina Lake Cannabis Corp. (CSE: CLC) reported that it will not meet the deadline to file its annual financial statements for the fiscal year ending on February 28, 2025. The company will not submit its annual financial statements, management's discussion and analysis, CEO certification, and CFO certification within the 120-day period after the year-end, as mandated under National Instrument 51-102 Continuous Disclosure Obligations and National Instrument 52-109 Certification of Disclosure in Issuers' Annual and Interim Filings.
news.headline: Christina Lake Cannabis delays filing its 2024 financial statements by missing the June 30 deadline.

news.summary: HANOI, Vietnam - FPT, a leading global IT services provider, has recently been honored at the 20th Annual 2025 Globee® Awards for Technology. The prestigious award program recognized FPT as the winner in five categories, highlighting the company's dedication to innovation and the creation of forward-thinking solutions that provide enduring benefits to global businesses. Among the accolades received, FPT was awarded the Silver Globee® in multiple categories, reaffirming its position as a key player in the industry. This recognition reflects FPT's ongoing commitment to delivering cutting-edge technologies and solutions that drive value for businesses worldwide.
news.headline: FPT wins 5 categories at 2025 Globee® Tech Awards, showcasing commitment to innovation. #FPT #GlobeeAwards.

news.summary: In Tokyo, Kioxia unveiled a new version of its KIOXIA AiSAQ software to enable balancing specific workloads in RAG systems seamlessly without any hardware alterations.
news.headline: KIOXIA updates AiSAQ software for AI RAG systems to optimize workloads without hardware changes.

news.summary: In Toronto, the Ontario Compensation Employees Union (OCEU/CUPE Local 1750), which represents 3,600 striking WSIB frontline workers, has voiced its solid backing for UNIFOR Local 4271 members facing a lockout at the CN Tower, possessed by Canada Lands Company. The OCEU reiterated its support during a recent demonstration in Toronto where its members joined forces with UNIFOR workers to showcase united strength against unjust labor practices. This move underlines the mounting discontent among public sector employees.
news.headline: OCEU/CUPE 1750 supports UNIFOR workers locked out at CN Tower, representing 3,600 striking WSIB frontline workers.
